title: Calomeria epapposa
taxonomy: Calomeria epapposa is classified as a species within the family Asteraceae. This classification places it as a member of the daisy or sunflower family. Further classification of Calomeria epapposa includes its order, Asterales, and its class, Magnoliopsida. At the kingdom level, it is classified as Plantae, which encompasses all flowering plants. The full classification of Calomeria epapposa follows the Linnaean system, providing a detailed and hierarchical structure.
